# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
spec:
  server:
    image:
      ref: gcr.io/linkerd-io/controller:latest
      pullPolicy: Always
  profileValidatorWebhook:
    enabled: false
  global:
    skipInstall: true
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: serverauth-config
spec:
  servers:
    - name: servicea
      hosts:
        - "servicea.example.com"
    - name: serviceb
      hosts:
        - "serviceb.example.com"
  auth:
    portBased:
      ports:
        - number: 8081
          policy: BYPASS
        - number: 8082
          policy: EMPTY_POLICY
    serviceAccounts:
      action: ALLOW
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  peers:
    - servicea
    - serviceb
